title: AFL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: AFL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the AFL Logistics family as a Warehouse Manager in Ranchi. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About AFL Logistics:
AFL Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AFL Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
